children.text: the validity of any final order or action (including a failure to act) of any Federal agency or officer under this chapter;
the constitutionality of any provision of this chapter, or any decision made or action taken under this chapter; or

children.label: A
children.text: subchapter II of chapter 5, and chapter 7, of title 5 (commonly known as the “Administrative Procedure Act”);

children.label: B
children.text: the Endangered Species Act of 1973 ( et seq.);16 U.S.C. 1531

children.label: C
children.text: the National Environmental Policy Act of 1969 ( et seq.);42 U.S.C. 4321

children.label: D
children.text: chapter 2003 of title 54; and1So in original. Probably should be “division A of subtitle III of title 54;”.1

children.label: E
children.text: the Alaska National Interest Lands Conservation Act ( et seq.).16 U.S.C. 3101

children.heading: Deadline for filing claim
children.label: b Deadline for filing claim
children.text: A claim arising under this chapter may be brought not later than 60 days after the date of the decision or action giving rise to the claim.

children.heading: Expedited consideration
children.label: c Expedited consideration
children.text: The United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit shall set any action brought under subsection (a) for expedited consideration, taking into account the national interest of enhancing national energy security by providing access to the significant gas reserves in Alaska needed to meet the anticipated demand for natural gas.
